pi_items.source: Task description (line 8) and Drupal user role naming conventions (machine name 'wholesale_buyer' for display label 'Wholesale Buyer')
Task description (line 8): 'Create a new user account with username corporate_buyer'

Task description (line 10) states 'Plugin: Manual'; Drupal Commerce documentation confirms 'Manual' is the default payment gateway plugin with machine ID 'manual'; verifier.py line 75 checks 'if plugin == manual' confirming this is the correct plugin ID

Task description (line 11) specifies full instructions: 'Payment due within 30 days of invoice date. Please include Order ID in wire transfer.' The metadata value is a verified substring. Export script (line 128) confirms verifier checks for this exact string.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a B2B Net 30 payment option in a Drupal Commerce environment. All metadata claims are verified against task requirements and Drupal Commerce documentation. The task involves: (1) creating a user role named 'Wholesale Buyer' with machine name 'wholesale_buyer', (2) creating a user account with username 'corporate_buyer', (3) configuring a payment gateway named 'Net 30 Invoice' using the 'manual' plugin with instructions containing 'Payment due within 30 days', and (4) applying a customer role condition to limit the gateway to wholesale buyers. The manual payment gateway is Drupal Commerce's built-in plugin for handling payments outside electronic systems, suitable for B2B invoice-based payment terms.
